tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions module

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.em(mocker: MockerFixture) → EmissionsEstimator
tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.feeds_grown() → list[dict[str, Any]]
tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.field_emissions() → dict[str, float]
tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.fertilizer_applications_data() → list[dict[str, Any]]
tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_emissions_estimator_init(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that crop configurations are parsed correctly when Emissions Estimator is created.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_estimate_emissions(homegrown_feeds: list[dict[str, Any]], fertilizer_applications: list[dict[str, Any]], manure_applications: list[dict[str, Any]], manure_requests: list[dict[str, Any]], em: EmissionsEstimator, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the estimation routines are called correctly.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_calculate_purchased_feed_emissions(homegrown_feeds: list[dict[str, Any]], purchased_feeds: dict[str, float], actual_purchased_feeds: dict[str, float], actual_purchased_feed_emissions: dict[str, float], actual_land_use_change_emissions: dict[str, float], em: EmissionsEstimator, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the calculation of purchased feed emissions.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_gather_homegrown_feeds_and_fertilizer_apps(mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests that the homegrown feeds and fertilizer applications were gathered correctly.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_gather_ration_feed_totals(mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Test that the totals of feeds from rations given to animals in the last 365 days of the simulation are correct.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_transform_outputs_to_list_of_dicts(em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Test that the function transform data to correct list of dicts.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_transform_outputs_to_list_of_dicts_length_unmatched(data: dict[str, dict[str, list[int]]], expected: list[dict[str, int]], expect_error: bool, mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Test that the function transform data to correct list of dicts with unmatched list length.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_calculate_actual_purchased_feeds(purchased_feeds: dict[str, float], expected: dict[str, float], mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests that the amount of actual purchased feeds were calculated correctly.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_calculate_total_homegrown_feed_amounts_by_crop_type(mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests that the amount of homegrown feeds for all the crop types were calculated correctly.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_calculate_actual_purchased_feed_emissions(mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Test the amount of purchased feed emissions with no errors.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_calculate_actual_purchased_feed_emissions_no_key(msg_name: str, message: str, emissions: list[dict[str, float]], mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Test the amount of purchased feed emissions with key errors.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_get_feed_emissions_data(feed_emission_data: dict[str, list[float]], county_code: int, expected: dict[str, float], em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests that feed emission data is correctly retrieved.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_get_feed_emissions_data_invalid_county_code(feed_emission_data: dict[str, list[float]], county_code: int, mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests errors were handled when trying to access invalid county code.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_calculate_homegrown_feed_emissions(mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests the result of calculated homegrown feed emissions.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_collect_target_soil_characteristics(mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests the collection of soil characteristics.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_calculate_emissions_by_field_zero_dry_mass(em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests the partitions emissions from the field where crops/feeds were grown to those crops when no dry yield.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_calculate_emissions_by_field(mocker: MockerFixture, feeds_grown: list[dict[str, Any]], em: EmissionsEstimator, field_emissions: dict[str, float], fertilizer_applications_data: list[dict[str, Any]]) → None

Tests the partitions emissions from the field where crops/feeds were grown to those crops.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_calculate_emissions_by_field_no_applied(mocker: MockerFixture, feeds_grown: list[dict[str, Any]], em: EmissionsEstimator, field_emissions: dict[str, float], fertilizer_applications_data: list[dict[str, Any]]) → None

Tests the partitions emissions from the field where crops/feeds were grown to those crops where no applications happened.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_partition_applied_crop_fertilizer_emissions(fertilizer_application: dict[str, float], applied_crops: list[dict[str, Any]], expected: list[dict[str, Any]], em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests that the partition of nutrients is applied to the crop correctly.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_filter_results(mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests that the filters taken in were correctly filtered.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_aggregate_data(em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests nutrient data for different types of applications aggregated correctly.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_apply_fertilizer_to_next_crop(fertilizer_application: dict[str, Any], sorted_crops: list[dict[str, Any]], fertilizer_application_date: date, no_next: bool, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests that the fertilizer is successfully applied to the next crop.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_extract_applied_crops(sorted_crops: list[dict[str, Any]], fertilizer_application_date: date, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests that applied crops are extracted correctly.

tests.test_EEE_module.test_emissions.test_soil_data_update(mocker: MockerFixture, em: EmissionsEstimator) → None

Tests the update of soil data.
